mapper.sql: SELECT m.id, m.category_id, c.name AS category_name, m.name, m.price, m.description, m.image_url, m.is_available, m.is_deleted, m.created_at FROM menu m LEFT JOIN category c ON m.category_id = c.id
mapper.select: WHERE m.is_deleted = false ORDER BY m.category_id, m.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menu (category_id, name, price, description, image_url, is_available) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{description}, #{imageUrl}, #{isAvailable})
mapper.update: UPDATE menu SET category_id = #{categoryId}, name = #{name}, price = #{price}, description = #{description}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, is_available = #{isAvailable} WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
UPDATE menu SET is_available = NOT is_available WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu m LEFT JOIN category c ON m.category_id = c.id WHERE c.type = #{type} AND m.is_deleted = false
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM menu WHERE is_deleted = #{isDeleted}
